positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical composition featuring stylized celestial elements intertwined with exotic, mythical flora. Incorporate geometric lunar phases, swirling nebulae patterns, and elegant, stylized jungle vines and leaves. Use a graphic neo-art nouveau botanical silhouette style. Focus on clean, crisp lines and strong, deep contrast. Limited, rich palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and emerald green, emphasizing the negative space. Centralized and contained composition, isolated entirely on a stark white background, optimized for clean screen printing and apparel transfer.
